input.subject: Collapse of a regional healthcare startup after receiving $18 million in state innovation grants
input.raw_notes:
- State approved first grant in spring 2022, $3.5 million
- Company launched telehealth platform summer 2022
- Patient complaints filed with state health board in 2023 — exact date unknown
- Second grant approved January 2024, $6.5 million
- CEO hired former state official as lobbyist in 2024
- Whistleblower complaint filed with state AG, date uncertain but sometime in late 2024
- Company abruptly shut down operations March 2025
- Third grant of $8 million reportedly approved but documentation missing

input.subject: Local school board hiring controversy
input.raw_notes:
- Board voted to hire new superintendent in September
- Background check revealed undisclosed prior termination in November

input.subject: Investigation into alleged cash-for-influence scheme involving members of the European Parliament
input.raw_notes:
- Belgian police seized €1.5 million in cash from a former MEP's home, December 2022
- Italian intelligence flagged suspicious payments to an NGO linked to the scheme, exact date unknown
- European Parliament voted to strip immunity from two members, February 2023
- Qatar denied all involvement through its embassy in Brussels, January 2023
- Belgian prosecutors charged four individuals, April 2023
- EU Parliament reformed its transparency rules, July 2023
- Trial began in Brussels, scheduled for 2025 but repeatedly delayed
